reapack.name: reaper_sneakpeak
reapack.desc: SneakPeak: Precision Waveform Item Editor for REAPER

version.name: 2.0.0-alpha.6
version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
v2.0.0 Alpha 4 - Multiplatform test build
Multiplatform: macOS (ARM64 + Intel), Windows x64, Linux (x86_64 + aarch64). Windows: fixed floating window rendering (WS_POPUP instead of WS_CHILD).

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Non-Destructive Paste, Bars/Beats Ruler, Trackpad Gestures, Ripple Delete
New features: - Non-destructive paste: Cmd+V inserts clipboard as new item (split + ripple + insert) - Bars & Beats ruler: synced with REAPER tempo map, measure/beat ticks - Ripple Delete: Shift+Delete/Shift+E closes gap after deletion - Arrow key segment navigation: Option+Left/Right with playback jump - Arrow key gain: Up/Down for +/-1 dB adjustment - Trackpad horizontal scroll: two-finger swipe pans waveform - Pinch to zoom: trackpad magnification gesture (dampened) - Gain knob relative indicator: gold "rel" label in batch mode
Bug fixes: - Scroll modifier detection (GetAsyncKeyState for SWELL compatibility) - SET mode only includes explicitly selected items (not range fill) - Track follow respects user's explicit item selection during playback - Fade-in/out preserved after gain+selection split operations - Gain double-apply eliminated (single-item to timeline transition) - Timeline/SET view rebuilt after gain and delete (no stale segments) - Space plays from cursor when outside selection - Cut uses ripple delete (standard waveform editor behavior) - Knob drag race condition fixed (skipBatchWrite set immediately) - Context menu fades align to selection edges - View duration clamped after ripple delete (no trailing silence)
Performance: - Full-selection gain skips split (direct D_VOL, no item fragmentation)

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Timeline View, Dock Control, Gain Consistency, Bug Fixes
New features: - Timeline View: after cutting an item, all fragments shown with gaps preserved - Dock/Undock via context menu, floating window resizable with position memory - Option+click snaps selection to segment boundaries (SET, timeline, multi-item) - Selection-aware gain works consistently across all view modes - Multi-item gap visualization and editing (delete, gain) - Drag export without Alt (drag selection outside window) - Split at Cursor in context menu
Bug fixes (thanks saxmand!): - Dock scroll no longer propagates to REAPER arrangement - T key no longer produces macOS error beep - Fade sync bidirectional in real-time - Fade handles always visible, correct item targeting in multi-item - Fade-in/out block each other at meeting point - Volume mismatch REAPER to SET fixed - Item length changes properly detected and reloaded - Repeated gain operations don't accumulate splits - Delete works at item start/end edges - Zoom preserved after cut, gain flash eliminated - Selection preserved after gain, undo refreshes timeline
Performance: - Instant gain via in-place audio buffer scaling - No audio reload on item position change

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Working Set Mode, Selection Gain, Clipping Visualization
New features: - Working Set mode: select items, press T to lock as persistent editing set - Continuous waveform with gaps collapsed, auto-restores on click back - Selection-aware gain: splits at edges with crossfade in SET mode - Clipping visualization: peaks above 0dB draw in red - Group Set Items: group edited items for timeline manipulation - Ripple edit in SET mode: delete pulls items together - Bidirectional cursor sync with REAPER timeline - Ruler time format toggle (relative / absolute) - REAPER action: "SneakPeak: Toggle Track View"
Improvements: - Drag export requires Alt/Option (prevents accidental drags) - Full codebase refactor: 82% reduction in main file, 8 focused modules - PreventUIRefresh on all undo blocks
Fixes: - Memory leak in RefreshItemSource (P_SOURCE) - Selection edges clamp to waveform area - Selection sync at item boundaries

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Fade Handles & Smart Save Workflow
New features: - Continuous fade curvature: vertical drag smoothly controls curve shape (matches REAPER) - Save As (Ctrl+Shift+S): save standalone files to custom location - Standalone waveform shows fade changes in real-time
Improvements: - Smart Save (Ctrl+S): confirms overwrite on WAV, auto-creates _edit.wav for MP3/FLAC - Drag to timeline: clean files use original (no copy), dirty files auto-save first - Exported files saved to project folder (not /tmp) - Fade handle hit zone doubled (16px), curvature range matches REAPER
Fixes: - Fade-in direction matches REAPER timeline (was inverted) - Drag export files no longer lost on restart - GitHub issue #1: "Weird fade handle behavior"

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Master Meter Mode & Meter Improvements
New features: - Master meter mode: MASTER tab in mode bar shows rolling peak waveform from master track output - Red clipping indicator when master signal exceeds 0dB - dB scale in master waveform view - Master Output meter source: right-click meters to read from master while viewing items - S shortcut for split at cursor
Fixes: - Meter accuracy: take D_VOL now included in level calculation - Multi-item volume changes auto-detected and reloaded - Latency-compensated meter sync - SWELL menu checkmarks no longer grayed out on macOS - Docker close crash on macOS
Improvements: - GDI caching for meters (0 allocations per frame) - Mode-dependent ballistics for master meter (Peak/VU/RMS)

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
Feature release: Multi-item views and professional metering
New features: - Meter mode selection: Peak (PPM), RMS (AES/EBU), VU — right-click meters to switch - Multi-item Mix mode: sum all items into single waveform on absolute timeline - Multi-item Layered mode (per Item): 8-color palette with transparency - Multi-item Layered mode (per Track): items colored by parent track - Crossfade join indicators at item transition midpoints - Batch gain control across multiple items
Improvements: - RMS integration window: 300ms per AES/EBU standard (was 50ms) - Optimized layered drawing for 20+ items across 10+ tracks - Zero warnings in Release build
Fixes: - Undo menu state in REAPER mode - Compiler warnings in Release build
